executionArgs.additionalInstruction: Project display name: Kwanza Stream. Frontend base URL: http://localhost:3000. Backend base URL: http://localhost:3001. Stack: Next.js 14 App Router + Express + TypeScript + Prisma 5 + PostgreSQL. Use the product requirements in docs/testsprite-prd.md and testsprite_tests/tmp/prd_files/testsprite-prd.md as the source of truth. Execute and validate ONLY flows under PRIORIDADE 1 (Autenticação) and PRIORIDADE 2 (Perfil e Onboarding): registration, duplicate email, weak password messaging, login success/fail, logout, refresh, protected routes, optional account lockout and password reset, profile create/edit, avatar valid/invalid types and size limits, province selection if present, duplicate username, invalid username characters. Prefer PT-AO error messages where specified. testsprite_frontend_test_plan.json may be empty; still cover onboarding/profile UI on the Next.js app at localhost:3000 where relevant.
